failures.description: The agent misread or misused the ProductCatalogSearch result and answered with item 1507389580 at $1157.86 even though the tool output showed item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Smartphone. The required tool call was made correctly, and the tool output at index 3 clearly returned two available Smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 first, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer from this tool output but selected the second, more expensive item as the cheapest. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator at index 5 reinforced the incorrect answer despite mentioning the lower-priced alternative.
